name: release-gate
description: Run the release gate mailbox scan, validate signed PRERELEASE_REQUEST handoffs, invoke the locked product-release-gate kernel, and send RELEASE_GATE_PASS or blocking notices without Codex runtime dependence.

interface.shortDescription: Validate PRERELEASE_REQUEST handoffs and announce release readiness
interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and OS scheduler. Scheduled run_once only processes new gate mail, enforces required checks, and advances successful events to RELEASE_READY_NOTIFIED without granting production authorization.
defaultPrompt: Run release-gate setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Run the headless release gate mailbox scan.
Show release-gate status and doctor output.
Diagnose the locked product-release-gate and mail binding.
